steps.title: Move the temperature term
steps.content:
Start with the given formula and subtract $T$ from both sides.
$$
D=T-\frac{4}{15}(100-H)
$$
$$
D-T=-\frac{4}{15}(100-H)
$$

steps.title: Isolate humidity
steps.content: Subtract $100$ from both sides, then multiply by $-1$. $$ H=100+\frac{15}{4}(D-T) $$ $$ H=\frac{15}{4}(D-T)+100 $$ The answer is A.
